<p>The world has evolved over-time and the way of approaching daily problems have also evolved over-time. We take your business and other solutions to the mobile world, trust us.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="section mcb-section" style="padding-top:0px; padding-bottom:10px; background-color:"><div class="section_wrapper mcb-section-inner"><div class="wrap mcb-wrap one-second valign-top clearfix" style="padding:0 1%"><div class="mcb-wrap-inner"><div class="column mcb-column one column_column"><div class="column_attr clearfix animate" data-anim-type="fadeInLeftLarge" style=" padding:0 10% 0 0;"><center><div class="image_frame image_item no_link scale-with-grid alignnone no_border"><div class="image_wrapper"><img class="scale-with-grid" src="https://lightworldtech.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/02/home_webdeveloper_pic3.png" alt="" title=""></div></div>

<hr class="no_line" style="margin: 0 auto 20px;">

<p>Our training centres are well structured to equip you with competitive well sought-after skills in IT and Fashion industries respectively. Idea generation and development for a greater future.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="wrap mcb-wrap one-second valign-top clearfix" style="padding:0 1%"><div class="mcb-wrap-inner"><div class="column mcb-column one column_column"><div class="column_attr clearfix animate" data-anim-type="fadeInRightLarge" style=" padding:0 10% 0 0;"><center><div class="image_frame image_item no_link scale-with-grid alignnone no_border"><div class="image_wrapper"><img class="scale-with-grid" src="https://lightworldtech.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/02/home_webdeveloper_pic4.png" alt="" title=""></div></div>

<p>It is not enough being on the internet with your business. There is a need for people all over the world to know who you are and what you have to offer them. Choosing us will make your brand name reach anyone who is looking for you, even those who are not. Get connected</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="section mcb-section" style="padding-top:0px; padding-bottom:10px; background-color:"><div class="section_wrapper mcb-section-inner"><div class="wrap mcb-wrap one valign-top clearfix" style="padding:0 1%"><div class="mcb-wrap-inner"><div class="column mcb-column one-second column_image"><div class="image_frame image_item scale-with-grid no_border"><div class="image_wrapper"><a href="https://www.lightworldtech.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/banner3.png" rel="prettyphoto"><div class="mask"></div><img class="scale-with-grid" src="https://www.lightworldtech.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/banner3.png" alt="Graphics and Web Design Ads" title="Graphics and Web Design Ads" width="1092" height="340"></a><div class="image_links"><a href="https://www.lightworldtech.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/banner3.png" class="zoom" rel="prettyphoto"><i class="icon-search"></i></a></div></div></div>
</div><div class="column mcb-column one-second column_image"><div class="image_frame image_item scale-with-grid no_border"><div class="image_wrapper"><a href="https://www.lightworldtech.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/Banner2.png" rel="prettyphoto"><div class="mask"></div><img class="scale-with-grid" src="https://www.lightworldtech.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/Banner2.png" alt="Web Desing Ads" title="Web Desing" width="1030" height="679"></a><div class="image_links"><a href="https://www.lightworldtech.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/Banner2.png" class="zoom" rel="prettyphoto"><i class="icon-search"></i></a></div></div></div>
</div><div class="column mcb-column one-second column_image"><div class="image_frame image_item scale-with-grid no_border" style="margin-top:-240px;"><div class="image_wrapper"><a href="https://www.lightworldtech.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/banner4.png" rel="prettyphoto"><div class="mask"></div><img class="scale-with-grid" src="https://www.lightworldtech.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/banner4.png" alt="Websites" title="Websites" width="997" height="401"></a><div class="image_links"><a href="https://www.lightworldtech.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/03/banner4.png" class="zoom" rel="prettyphoto"><i class="icon-search"></i></a></div></div></div>
</div></div></div></div></div><div class="section mcb-section" id="development_process" style="padding-top:80px; padding-bottom:90px; background-color:#edf2ff; background-image:url(https://localhost/lightworldtech.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/02/home_webdeveloper_subheaderbg5.png); background-repeat:no-repeat; background-position:center top; background-attachment:; background-size:; -webkit-background-size:"><div class="section_wrapper mcb-section-inner"><div class="wrap mcb-wrap one valign-top clearfix"><div class="mcb-wrap-inner"><div class="column mcb-column one-fourth column_placeholder"><div class="placeholder"> </div></div><div class="column mcb-column one-second column_column"><div class="column_attr clearfix align_center animate" data-anim-type="bounceIn"><div class="image_frame image_item no_link scale-with-grid alignnone no_border"><div class="image_wrapper"><img class="scale-with-grid" src="https://lightworldtech.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/02/home_webdeveloper_services1.png" alt="" title=""></div></div>

<h3>OUR DEVELOPMENT PROCESS</h3>
<hr class="no_line" style="margin: 0 auto 10px;">

<p>We take a structured approach to web design. Our development process was created to ensure every project is delivered on-time and on-budget. Once your web design project kicks off, here’s what to expect:</p></div></div><div class="column mcb-column one column_divider"><hr class="no_line">
</div></div></div><div class="wrap mcb-wrap one valign-top clearfix"><div class="mcb-wrap-inner"><div class="column mcb-column one column_column"><div class="column_attr clearfix animate" data-anim-type="fadeInUpLarge" style=" padding:0 5px 0 8px;"><div id="ps-timeline65d7614875654c2c57e281819938678c" class="row example-centered"><ul class="ps_timeline ps_timeline-centered"><li class="ps_timeline-item"><div class="ps_timeline-marker"></div><div class="ps_timeline-content"><h3 class="ps_timeline-label">Initial Planning</h3><h4 class="ps_timeline-title">Initial Planning</h4><p><span class="icon-placeholder-v"><i class="fa fa-pencil"></i></span> </p><div class="ps_v_content"> <p>The first order of business is to sit down with your team and create a detailed set of design and technical specifications. These specifications serve as a road-map for the rest of the web design process.</p></div></div></li><li class="ps_timeline-item"><div class="ps_timeline-marker"></div><div class="ps_timeline-content"><h3 class="ps_timeline-label">Wireframing/ flowchart</h3><h4 class="ps_timeline-title">Wireframing</h4><p><span class="icon-placeholder-v"><i class="fa fa-cubes"></i></span> </p><div class="ps_v_content"> <p>Wireframes are your first chance to visualize your website. While they’re not nearly as detailed as the final site will be, they give us a visual representation of the site’s overall layout.</p></div></div></li><li class="ps_timeline-item"><div class="ps_timeline-marker"></div><div class="ps_timeline-content"><h3 class="ps_timeline-label">Mockups</h3><h4 class="ps_timeline-title">Mockups</h4><p><span class="icon-placeholder-v"><i class="fa fa-modx"></i></span> </p><div class="ps_v_content"> <p>Once all site wireframes are completed and approved, we’ll proceed with site mockups. These add color and a bit more detail to the initial wireframes, giving us a stronger visual representation of the final product.</p></div></div></li><li class="ps_timeline-item"><div class="ps_timeline-marker"></div><div class="ps_timeline-content"><h3 class="ps_timeline-label">Copy & Graphics</h3><h4 class="ps_timeline-title">Copy and Graphics & UI</h4><p><span class="icon-placeholder-v"><i class="fa fa-pencil-square-o"></i></span> </p><div class="ps_v_content"> <p>Once we’ve agreed on a final design based on the mockups, our team will proceed with to develop the graphical interface that will represent client’s on the web and the mechanisms through which the end user will navigate and interact with the site – (optional). Lightworld Technologies Limited will focus on developing a website design for the client that uses color, font, icon and layout to stand out more, communicate effectively and ultimately be memorable. It is also important for the client to begin preparing any new content, or updating existing content as early as possible.</p></div></div></li><li class="ps_timeline-item"><div class="ps_timeline-marker"></div><div class="ps_timeline-content"><h3 class="ps_timeline-label">Development</h3><h4 class="ps_timeline-title">Development</h4><p><span class="icon-placeholder-v"><i class="fa fa-code"></i></span> </p><div class="ps_v_content"> <p>At this stage, we will kick off the technical side of the web design process. This will include setting up your Content Management System (CMS), creating your custom theme and page designs, and setting up your website’s analytics. In addition, during this process we will use Cascading Style Sheets (CSS) to separate the underlying structure of the data from its presentation. Developing websites in CSS also allows pages to load more quickly, compatibility with multiple platforms and devices, and improved control over page display. We work with our clients to ensure optimal search engine optimization (SEO) when building websites. This helps your website to be indexed by top search engines such as Google, Yahoo and Bing by making it visible to search results that match with any of your contents.</p></div></div></li><li class="ps_timeline-item"><div class="ps_timeline-marker"></div><div class="ps_timeline-content"><h3 class="ps_timeline-label">Testing</h3><h4 class="ps_timeline-title">Testing</h4><p><span class="icon-placeholder-v"><i class="fa fa-stethoscope"></i></span> </p><div class="ps_v_content"> <p>Once our writers, designers, and developers have finished their work, our team will get to work, testing your site’s performance and reliability. We will use various tools to benchmark your site for loading, responsiveness, and speed, while also ensuring that it works reliably on all web browsers and mobile devices.</p></div></div></li><li class="ps_timeline-item"><div class="ps_timeline-marker"></div><div class="ps_timeline-content"><h3 class="ps_timeline-label">Training and Documentation</h3><h4 class="ps_timeline-title">Training and Documentation</h4><p><span class="icon-placeholder-v"><i class="fa fa-slideshare"></i></span> </p><div class="ps_v_content"> <p>We will work with you to ensure that the various members of your institution fully understand how to use the content management system and are comfortable utilizing the system to its fullest capacity. We will consider organizing the training section for a maximum of five (5) attendees from your as this will ensure and optimal training environment that encourages and effective dialogue between the trainer and the trainees. Lightworld Technologies Limited will also develop a user guide for client’s staffs that need to interact with the administrative functions of the website using the CMS. This documentation will help our clients understand and use the software application in cases of updates or uploading content.</p></div></div></li><li class="ps_timeline-item"><div class="ps_timeline-marker"></div><div class="ps_timeline-content"><h3 class="ps_timeline-label">Deployment & Optimization</h3><h4 class="ps_timeline-title">Deployment & Optimization</h4><p><span class="icon-placeholder-v"><i class="fa fa-paper-plane"></i></span> </p><div class="ps_v_content"> <p>Once we’re sure that your site is ready to be released to the public, we will deploy it on your public domain. Then, we will shift into a free monthly support process that will continue for 6 months. During that period, we will create monthly backups of your site, update scripts and plugins to maintain security and reliability, and perform layout and content updates at your request.</p></div></div></li></ul></div><style type="text/css">#ps-timeline65d7614875654c2c57e281819938678c .ps_timeline-content .ps_timeline-label{color:#e71d1d!important;}
